visual_description: A close-up shot from inside a car focuses on a man in the driver's seat. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a black t-shirt. He appears distressed, with a pained and sweaty face as he speaks to another person in the passenger seat, who is mostly out of frame. The background outside the car is a bright, blurry, and indistinct landscape. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a stylized font. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's emotional expression. A man speaks in a strained and pained voice, his words coming out in a rushed, almost desperate tone. He sounds as if he's in great distress, possibly crying or on the verge of it. "按摩女郎不漂亮，那就没劲了。" (If the massage girl isn't pretty, then it's no fun.) The camera angle shifts to a tighter close-up on the man's face. His expression is one of deep distress and sadness, with tears welling in his eyes. The person in the passenger seat is now visible on the left, though their features are blurred. The man's face is glistening with sweat, emphasizing his emotional turmoil. The "风行网" text
